mapper.select: select role_id, name, type, is_delete, create_time, update_time from mw_role where is_delete = 0 order by role_id asc
select role_id, name, type, is_delete, create_time, update_time from mw_role where role_id = #{roleId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select role_id, name, type, is_delete, create_time, update_time from mw_role where is_delete = 0 order by role_id desc
select role_id, name, type, is_delete, create_time, update_time from mw_role where is_delete = 0 and name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by role_id desc
select count(*) from mw_role where is_delete = 0 and name = #{name}
mapper.insert: insert into mw_role(name, type, is_delete, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{type}, 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update mw_role set is_delete = 1, update_time = now() where role_id = #{roleId} and is_delete = 0
